component.name: Caffeine for COSMIC
component.summary: Keep your screen awake from the panel
Mantén tu pantalla despierta desde el panel

description.p: A lightweight tray indicator for the COSMIC desktop that prevents the screen from turning off or the system from suspending due to inactivity, with a single click from the panel's Status Area.
Un indicador ligero para el escritorio COSMIC que evita que la pantalla se apague o el equipo se suspenda por inactividad, con un solo clic desde la bandeja del panel.

ul.li: One-click toggle from the COSMIC panel
Timed sessions: 15 min, 30 min, 1 h, 2 h, 4 h
Uses the native COSMIC idle-inhibition mechanism (cosmic-idle)

screenshot.caption: The Caffeine menu in the COSMIC panel
